title: 无标题文章
summary: It's interesting seeing Zig folk laud their assert function in contrast to C's assert macro, when it seems like in Kotlin the assert function behavior is criticized in comparison to Java's assert language keyword. I definitely want the macro/Java-like behavior but with a lambda syntax to make the effects (or lack thereof) more obvious. https:// cryptocode.g…
content:
It's interesting seeing Zig folk laud their assert function in contrast to C's assert macro, when it seems like in Kotlin the assert function behavior is criticized in comparison to Java's assert language keyword. I definitely want the macro/Java-like behavior but with a lambda syntax to make the effects (or lack thereof) more obvious.

  • https://cryptocode.github.io/blog/docs/assert/
  • https://publicobject.com/2019/11/18/kotlins-assert-is-not-like-javas-assert/
